summary: Tested two fixes: 1) PIN keypad buttons are now SQUARE (aspect-square + rounded-lg), 2) Kiosk without PIN is BLOCKED showing 'Kiosk Niet Beschikbaar' message. All 7 tests passed (100% success rate).

test_results.pin_input_square_dimensions: PASS - All 4 PIN inputs have w-16 h-16 lg:w-20 lg:h-20 (square)
test_results.pin_input_rounded_lg: PASS - All PIN inputs have rounded-lg corners (not rounded-2xl)
test_results.keypad_buttons_aspect_square: PASS - All 11 keypad buttons have aspect-square class
test_results.keypad_buttons_rounded_lg: PASS - All keypad buttons have rounded-lg corners
test_results.kiosk_no_pin_blocked: PASS - Company without PIN shows 'Kiosk Niet Beschikbaar' block screen
test_results.kiosk_with_pin_shows_entry: PASS - Company with PIN shows PIN entry screen (KioskPinEntry)
test_results.terug_naar_home_button: PASS - 'Terug naar Home' button on blocked kiosk redirects to /vastgoed

features_tested: PIN keypad buttons on login page are square (aspect-square) with rounded-lg corners
PIN input fields are square (w-16 h-16 / w-20 h-20) with rounded-lg corners
PIN login with valid PIN (1234) works and redirects to kiosk
Kiosk page for company WITHOUT PIN (a0405e21) shows 'Kiosk Niet Beschikbaar' block screen
Kiosk page for company WITH PIN (95a0cd46) shows PIN entry screen
KioskPinEntry component also has square keypad buttons (aspect-square + rounded-lg)
'Terug naar Home' button on blocked kiosk page works
critical_code_review_comments: CompanySelect.jsx keypad buttons correctly use aspect-square rounded-lg (lines 438-442)
CompanySelect.jsx PIN inputs correctly use w-16 h-16 lg:w-20 lg:h-20 rounded-lg (line 414)
KioskLayout.jsx correctly implements 'no-pin' step that blocks access (lines 114-133)
KioskPinEntry.jsx keypad buttons correctly use aspect-square rounded-lg (lines 188-193)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two fixes verified: 1) PIN keypad buttons changed from h-16 to aspect-square and from rounded-2xl to rounded-lg - buttons are now visually SQUARE. 2) Kiosk without PIN is BLOCKED - shows 'Kiosk Niet Beschikbaar' message with Lock icon, explanation text, and 'Terug naar Home' button. Tuya circuit breaker API is MOCKED in backend.
